findings.title: N+1 query on order list endpoint (fetches customer per row)
findings.evidence: Each order triggers a separate SELECT on customers. With 1000 orders: 1001 queries, ~2.5s p50 in staging.
findings.action: Use SQLAlchemy joinedload: Order.query.options(joinedload(Order.customer)).all() — single query, 10-15x speedup.

findings.title: No response compression on /api responses
findings.code_snippet:
app = Flask(__name__)
# TODO: add CORS
CORS(app)
findings.evidence: Large JSON responses (1-5MB for reports endpoint) ship uncompressed. gzip would cut payload to ~15%.
findings.action: Add flask-compress middleware with gzip + brotli. Verify with curl -I -H 'Accept-Encoding: gzip'.

ideas.title: Introduce request-level caching with Redis for /dashboard/summary
ideas.detail: Dashboard aggregates 12 queries per load, p95 = 1.8s. 60s TTL cache keyed by user_id + day would drop it to <50ms for >95% of hits.

ideas.title: Profile with py-spy in production and add latency histograms
ideas.detail: py-spy --pid + prometheus_client.Histogram on top 10 endpoints. Surfaces regression signatures before users notice.
